# Interface: ExecOptions

Defined in: [core/ports/cli.port.ts:19](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/cli.port.ts#L19)

Options for the long-running form of `.exec()` (CONVENTIONS B2). When
either option is present the process is spawned and observed: it resolves
as soon as `waitFor` appears in stdout/stderr, and is killed when `timeout`
elapses (exit code 124).

## Properties

### timeout?

```ts
optional timeout?: number;
```

Defined in: [core/ports/cli.port.ts:23](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/cli.port.ts#L23)

Kill the process after this many milliseconds. Defaults to 10 000.

***

### waitFor?

```ts
optional waitFor?: string;
```

Defined in: [core/ports/cli.port.ts:21](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/cli.port.ts#L21)

Resolve (exit code 0) when stdout/stderr contains this string.
